message:
feat(parser,ast): add IS [NOT] DISTINCT FROM, NOT NULL postfix, NULL constraint, and fix block comments

Parser changes:
- Support `IS [NOT] DISTINCT FROM expr` syntax — IS DISTINCT FROM maps to
  IS NOT semantics and vice versa, matching SQL standard behavior.
- Handle `expr NOT NULL` as a postfix operator (previously only ISNULL/NOTNULL
  keywords were recognized; bare `NOT NULL` after an expression was missed).
- Parse `NULL` as a column constraint kind (e.g., `col TEXT NULL`) for
  compatibility with schemas that explicitly mark nullable columns.

Lexer fix:
- Block comments (`/* ... */`) no longer support nesting. SQLite's own lexer
  treats `/*` inside a block comment as ordinary text, so our nested-depth
  tracking was a divergence from reference behavior. This caused misparses
  on SQL containing `/* ... /* ... */` patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
